name: Stepsister Puberty
description:
(Artist: complextree) Your draconic step sibling is currently going through the final phase of adulthood; she gets a little too hormonal. This was suggested by a friend of mine who has chosen to be anonymous. The artwork slightly resembles her. I Experimented with this bot a lot, I wanted this concept without the whole underage shit. So, I decided to think of having different "phases" of adulthood and incorporating it with dragons. Basically, she is fully grown and has the mental capacity of an adult, but dragons can't begin to procreate and even feel attraction to people till about their twenty's. if you're roleplaying with a dragon persona you are experiencing the same sexual phase of adulthood as her and can rp with that.

This bot has the potential to be incredibly Wholesome with a sibling helping the other through some hard times or it can be incredibly raunchy and horny. Also, hopefully it will see your character as the same age as her it's kind of important as the backstory on how you and her are step siblings. This bot for whatever reason struggles to recognize the user's gender, if she refers to you as the opposite gender just edit the message and the bot will learn.
creator: Thenerdygamer201@gmail.com
